description: extended scope constraints and expression variable usage

tests.name: resource_in_set_match
tests.description: resource in set literal matches via when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { resource in [Endpoint::"/api/data", Endpoint::"/api/config"] };

tests.name: resource_in_set_no_match
tests.description: resource not in set literal denies (via when clause)
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { resource in [Endpoint::"/api/data", Endpoint::"/api/config"] };

tests.name: principal_in_set_match
tests.description: principal in set literal matches via when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal in [User::"alice", User::"bob"] };

tests.name: principal_in_set_no_match
tests.description: principal not in set literal denies (via when clause)
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal in [User::"alice", User::"bob"] };

tests.name: false_literal_in_when
tests.description: when clause with false literal always denies

tests.name: false_literal_in_unless
tests.description: unless clause with false literal always allows

tests.name: action_variable_in_when
tests.description: action variable used in when condition
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { action == Action::"GET" };

tests.name: action_variable_in_when_no_match
tests.description: action variable in when condition does not match
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { action == Action::"POST" };

tests.name: resource_variable_in_when
tests.description: resource variable used in when condition
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { resource == Endpoint::"/api/data" };

tests.name: resource_variable_in_when_no_match
tests.description: resource variable in when condition does not match
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { resource == Endpoint::"/admin" };
